facts: The Cosmic Compass operates on a pure 1:1 Astronomical Unit scale, matching the precise macro-geometry of our solar system.
Progression is calculated using a true 1.618 Golden Ratio scaling architecture rather than arbitrary human timeframes.
The baseline resonance anchor for progression distance is calibrated exactly to 432 AU.
At an average flight speed of 30 AU/H, unlocking the final ship requires exactly one complete 28-day lunar cycle.
1 Screen Width in the engine equals 1 Astronomical Unit, bridging UI design directly into orbital mechanics.
The core engine architecture replaces fragmented, linear object hierarchies with a continuous, unified resonant field.
Ship exhaust vector emission forces are normalized against the background grid to prevent infinite GPU blowout.
Distance traveled is mathematically ticking up every frame at 60 FPS, down to 4 decimal points of AU precision.
The system fundamentally strips out Newtonian approximations in favor of Golden Ratio geometric absolute coordinates.
Visual telemetry outputs directly sync with the physics engine without React re-render overhead by mutating the DOM layer directly.
The legacy kilometers measurement system was completely removed in favor of infinite-scale AU rendering.
Every ship unlock acts as a major mathematical boundary threshold on the 432 AU exponential curve.
Background parallax is decoupled into three strict depth layers (foreground, midground, cosmic background) maintaining geometric perspective.
Vector-based planet rendering removes standard image artifacts, scaling infinitely on the 1:1 canvas.
The screensaver and main game CMS read from the exact same JSON pipeline, ensuring total mathematical synchronicity.
All ship UI effects utilize CSS-native blending rather than heavy WebGL fragment shaders for massive optimization.
By shifting the K-Scale, the atomic structure of the engine's progression can be altered without breaking the underlying physics.
The engine simulates lightspeed scaling organically; Earth to Sun takes realistic simulation time relative to the speed input.
Grid alignments in the World Engine adhere to the strict 23-point glyph intersections of the Cosmic Compass.
Dynamic camera panning dynamically shifts the local AU coordinates relative to the Golden Ratio center point.
Planet-to-planet distances are not compressed. The engine honors the vast emptiness of true space.
Audio frequencies are designed to map directly onto the 432Hz baseline to align with the visual scaling engine.
The cinematic letterbox timing uses linear geometric transitions rather than arbitrary easing curves.
The engine’s memory state is fully persistent via JSON hydration, allowing the continuous 28-day flight to resume seamlessly.
The entire framework is living proof that high-level programming is just applied sacred geometry.
quotes: The Cosmic Compass is validated by the 23 glyphs of the ancient Meroitic script, the true origin of resonant geometry.
Before Pythagoras ever drew a triangle, the geometric laws of the universe were already recorded in the sands of the Nile.
The 1611 King James Bible's 23 letters retain the exact glyph angles of African knowledge, preserving a compass long forgotten.
The foundation of harmonic resonance was not discovered in Greece; it was transferred from the architects of the ancient African continent.
True mathematical purity doesn't bend to modern conventions; it aligns with the original, ancient structural grid of reality.
Sacred geometry is the language of the universe, and its earliest alphabet was carved into the stones of ancient Africa.
The Cosmic Compass is alive. It is not just a tool; it is the fundamental blueprint of resonant frequency boundaries.
Modern physics attempts to describe what ancient African science already knew how to construct.
The Golden Ratio is the heartbeat of creation, first measured by those who built monuments aligned with the stars.
Resonance is the bridge between matter and energy, a secret held in the 23 points of the original cosmic grid.
To understand the macrocosm, one must study the ancient blueprints of the microcosm.
The true scale of the universe is found not in linear mathematics, but in the resonant frequency of the Golden Proportion.
History has reassigned the credit, but the geometry of the Earth remembers its original authors.
Frequency boundaries define the structure of reality. The ancient builders knew exactly where these boundaries lay.
The Meroitic script is more than a language; it is a mathematical map of the cosmos.
Every angle, every line in the original 23 glyphs holds a specific resonant frequency.
The compass does not point north; it points inward to the center of universal resonance.
We do not invent mathematics; we rediscover the ancient truths written in the architecture of the cosmos.
The true mastery of space requires an understanding of the geometric harmony of the ancients.
When you align with the 432 resonance, you are aligning with the original frequency of the Earth.
The geometry of the heavens was brought down to Earth millennia ago in the heart of Africa.
A unified field theory already existed in the minds of the ancient priests and architects.
The 23 letters are a code, preserving the angles of a profound, universal truth.
The universe speaks in frequency, and the earliest humans to listen wrote down its vocabulary.
To build a true world engine, one must build it upon the ancient foundations of the Cosmic Compass.

_meta.description: ALLIANCES progression cost matrix. Defines how costs scale by tier, octave, and arc phase. All equipment costs in equipment_catalog.json are base (tier 1) values. This matrix defines multipliers for upgrades and unlocks.

venus-protocol.note: Crash conditions. Everything costs exactly what it costs.

forge-sequence.note: Mid-build. Material scarcity on Venus. 40% markup.

breakout.note: Final push. Critical components at critical prices.

alliance-formation.note: Alliance network active. Trade discounts apply.

buildingCosts._note: Buildings are purchased with empire resources, not octave currency.

tier1.note: Venus arc only. Required for Forge Sequence.

shipProgression._note: Ship slots unlock by arc phase. Each ship can equip one item per slot category.

venus-protocol.note: 3 ships. The ones that survived the crash.

breakout.note: 6 ships. Enough to run the extraction.

bondThresholds._note: Bond values that trigger narrative or mechanical consequences.

trust.70: Alliance-grade. Unlocks breakout arc co-pilot bonus.
trust.90: Full trust. Rare. The game notices.

debt.80: Critical. Butterworth files reports about it.
debt.100: Breaking point. Arc branch: Howard does something about it.

tension.70: Active conflict. Announcer lines shift tone.
tension.90: Crisis level. Arc trigger: forced resolution event.

respect.0: None. They are aware each other exists.
respect.60: Earned. Howard flew through something. Eve noticed.
respect.85: Commander-level recognition. Unlocks Sci Eve shared mission arcs.

matchBondDeltas._note: Default bond changes applied after each match result. Game can override with context-specific values.

octaveCurrencyYield._note: How much octave currency each match result generates per arc phase.

nodes.content:

newsFeed.body:
We've love screensavers, we love games and we love beautiful and epic space themes.

We are building out a new universe where space is rendered in real-time 8k resolution for the most magical space adventures ever. 

Install today and get an exclusive NEW ship!
